hero.tagline: Web developer based in Norway. I create custom websites, web applications, and SaaS products for businesses and founders who want something that actually works.

services.label: What I offer
services.title: Services
services.subtitle: From idea to finished product. I take ownership of the entire process - design, development, and launch.
services.web_desc: Custom websites and landing pages focused on speed, SEO, and user experience.
services.software_desc: Tailored solutions for businesses that need more than off-the-shelf - from internal tools to customer platforms.
services.saas_desc: Subscription-based web applications with payments, user authentication, and multi-tenant architecture.
services.pwa_desc: Web apps that work offline, can be installed, and deliver a native app experience in the browser.
services.fullstack_desc: Frontend and backend - database, API, authentication, and infrastructure. One person, the whole stack.
services.consulting_desc: Technical sparring, architecture advice, and code review for teams that want to make better technical decisions.

projects.label: Portfolio
projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Products I have built from scratch - planning, development, launch and continued improvement.
projects.losttags_desc: LostTags is a QR-based labelling and tracking platform for assets. Users create custom QR code labels and attach them to equipment, luggage, or valuables. If something goes missing and someone scans the label, the owner is automatically notified via SMS or email.
projects.losttags_f1: Custom QR code labels with multiple frame designs
projects.losttags_f2: Automatic notifications via SMS (Twilio) and email (Resend)
projects.inventoriz_desc: Inventoriz is a free inventory management system for small teams and individuals. Track items, scan QR codes, manage locations, and collaborate - all in one place. Built as a full PWA that works offline.
projects.inventoriz_f1: QR scanning directly in the browser

about.label: About me
about.title: Thorleif Jacobsen
about.body1: I am a web developer based in Norway with a passion for building products that solve real problems. I enjoy the full stack - from database and API to user interface and infrastructure.
about.body2: I have built and launched my own SaaS products and work with businesses and individuals who want custom digital solutions without unnecessary complexity.
about.fact_coffee: Fuelled by coffee and good user experiences
about.val1_desc: Complexity is not a goal. I create solutions that are easy to use, maintain, and build upon.
about.val2_desc: I build products I use and own myself - that gives me a genuine understanding of what actually matters.
about.val3_desc: From idea to MVP quickly, with room for iteration based on user feedback.

contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Get in touch
contact.subtitle: Have a project you want to discuss, or just want to say hi? Send me a message - I usually reply within a day.
contact.name: Name
contact.subject: Subject
contact.sent_sub: I will get back to you as soon as possible.
